how_it_works: Map mods appear on magic (blue), rare (yellow), and corrupted maps. You can roll mods using Orbs of Alteration, Cartographer's Chisels, and Blessed Orbs. More mods = more quantity/rarity bonus but higher risk. Some mods are build-defining dangers — know which ones to avoid before entering.
tips: No Regen maps require a mana or life flask — always run one when you see this mod.
Reflect mods (Elemental/Physical) are build-specific dangers — check before entering.

mods.name: Players cannot Regenerate Life, Mana or Energy Shield
mods.effect: All regeneration is disabled. Life, Mana, and ES recovery via regeneration do not work.
mods.counter: Use instant life flasks. Mana flasks for mana. Leech-based recovery still works.
mods.notes: One of the most common dangerous mods. Always run a life flask before entering.

mods.name: Monsters reflect X% of Elemental Damage
mods.effect: A percentage of elemental damage you deal to monsters is reflected back to you.
mods.counter: Avoid if playing an elemental skill. Some Ascendancies (Inquisitor) have reflect immunity.
mods.notes: Can one-shot high-damage builds instantly. Physical-only builds are unaffected.

mods.name: Monsters reflect X% of Physical Damage
mods.effect: A percentage of physical damage you deal is reflected back to you.
mods.counter: Avoid if playing a physical skill. Pure spell builds (non-physical) are unaffected.
mods.notes: Berserkers with Rite of Ruin are especially vulnerable. Slayer has reflect immunity.

mods.name: Players are Cursed with Temporal Chains
mods.effect: All of your action speeds (move, attack, cast) are slowed significantly. Buff durations reduced.
mods.counter: Flasks with 'Remove Curses' suffix or the Cleansing suffix. Curse immunity helps.
mods.notes: Stacks with other slows. Flask durations are reduced, making flasks less effective.

mods.name: Players are Cursed with Enfeeble
mods.effect: Reduces your accuracy, critical strike chance, and damage dealt.
mods.counter: Curse immune flasks. Spell builds are less affected than attack builds.
mods.notes: Significantly reduces effective DPS and accuracy. Less dangerous than reflect but noticeable.

mods.name: Players are Cursed with Vulnerability
mods.effect: You take increased physical damage and have increased chance to be affected by bleed/maim.
mods.counter: Curse immune flasks. High armour helps reduce the physical damage.
mods.notes: Dangerous in maps with many phys-damage monsters. Most dangerous in combination with other mods.

mods.name: Area contains two Unique Bosses
mods.effect: The map boss spawns as two copies simultaneously.
mods.counter: Kill one quickly; control spacing to avoid double-boss overlap attacks.
mods.notes: Very common on maps. Bosses die individually. Quantity bonus is high — worth running.

mods.name: Monsters have X% increased Critical Strike Chance
mods.effect: All monsters have significantly higher critical strike chance.
mods.counter: High armour, Fortify, Basalt flask reduce crit damage. Blind and evasion help.
mods.notes: Especially dangerous on maps with already-hard-hitting unique enemies.

mods.name: Monsters have a X% chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments
mods.effect: Monsters have a chance to resist being ignited, chilled, frozen, shocked, etc.
mods.counter: Avoid for pure ailment builds (e.g. freeze chain). Damage builds that just apply occasionally are OK.
mods.notes: Freeze-based clear can break down entirely. Ignite prolif builds should avoid.

mods.name: Monsters are Hexproof
mods.effect: Monsters cannot be affected by curses.
mods.counter: Avoid if curses are core to your damage (Hexblast, curse aura builds). Fine for non-curse builds.
mods.notes: Does not block Impending Doom (it triggers on the curse, not after). Check your build's curse reliance.

mods.name: Monsters Immune to Elemental Damage
mods.effect: Monsters cannot be damaged by fire, cold, or lightning damage.
mods.counter: Avoid entirely if your skill deals elemental damage. Physical or chaos builds are unaffected.
mods.notes: Extremely rare but completely disabling for elemental builds.

mods.name: Monsters have X% more Life
mods.effect: All monsters have more total health.
mods.counter: Accept the slower pace or reroll. Common on higher-tier maps.
mods.notes: Not dangerous, just slower. Combined with other mods increases IIQ, worth running.

mods.name: Monsters deal X% extra Physical Damage as Fire/Cold/Lightning
mods.effect: All monster hits deal extra elemental damage on top of their physical damage.
mods.counter: Ensure elemental resistances are capped at 75%. Elemental flasks help.
mods.notes: Extremely common. Always keep resistances capped — this mod highlights the danger of uncapped res.

mods.name: Monsters have Onslaught
mods.effect: All monsters move, attack, and cast 20% faster.
mods.counter: Increase vigilance. Kite when possible. Better armor/evasion required.
mods.notes: Makes fast monsters significantly more threatening. Combines badly with monster crit.

mods.name: Monsters cannot be Slowed below base speed
mods.effect: Your slowing effects (chill, temporal chains on enemies) have no effect.
mods.counter: Avoid for chill-based kiting builds. Damage builds are barely affected.
mods.notes: Chill from Hatred or Herald of Ice won't slow. Boss fights become more demanding.

mods.name: Area has increased Monster Density
mods.effect: More monsters spawn throughout the map.
mods.counter: No counter needed. Farm this mod actively.
mods.notes: Best possible quantity mod. Extra monsters = more loot and XP. Prioritize maps with this.

mods.name: Monsters drop X% increased Quantity of Items
mods.effect: All monsters drop more items. Increases the number of items found.
mods.counter: No counter needed.
mods.notes: Stacks multiplicatively with character IIQ and other quantity sources.

mods.name: Players have -X% to maximum Resistances
mods.effect: Your maximum elemental resistance is reduced (normally 75%, becomes 70% or lower).
mods.counter: Very hard to counter. Requires higher total resistance to maintain near-max.
mods.notes: Combined with elemental conversion mods, this can be fatal. Reroll if below T15.

mods.name: Monsters have X% chance to Avoid Poison, Blind and Bleeding
mods.effect: Monsters resist being poisoned, blinded, or made to bleed.
mods.counter: Avoid for poison or bleed DoT builds. Blind-based evasion builds lose defensive value.
mods.notes: Poison builds should reroll this mod. The chance means some procs still land.

mods.name: Monsters are Immune to Knockback
mods.effect: Knockback effects from your skills and items have no effect on monsters.
mods.counter: Minor inconvenience for most builds. Reroll if your safety relies on knockback.
mods.notes: Rare to see builds truly reliant on knockback. Usually a cosmetic change.

mods.name: Unique Boss has X% increased Life and Damage
mods.effect: The map's unique boss has significantly higher health and deals more damage.
mods.counter: Bring more DPS and defensive flasks. Consider avoiding on maps with already-deadly bosses.
mods.notes: Very common mod. The IIQ bonus it contributes makes it worth fighting on most maps.

mods.name: Monsters gain an Endurance/Frenzy/Power Charge on Hit
mods.effect: Monsters build up charges when they hit you, gaining power quickly.
mods.who_is_affected: Slow-clearing builds, tanky builds that take many hits
mods.counter: Kill fast. Do not facetank packs for extended periods.
mods.notes: Frenzy charges on monsters increase their attack/cast speed — especially dangerous.

mods.name: Monsters Hinder Players
mods.effect: Players are slowed (movement speed reduced) when hit by monsters.
mods.counter: Movement speed flasks. Keep distance from monster packs.
mods.notes: Hinder and Chill stack. Combined with Temporal Chains, movement can become extremely slow.
